message:
fix(core): remove unwrap() calls in ART insert and CSR graph builder

art.rs: Restructure insert() to use if-let on self.root instead of
is_none() check followed by as_mut().unwrap(), eliminating a potential
panic path.

succinct.rs: Replace repeated offsets.last().unwrap() with a running
`last` accumulator in CsrGraph::from_edges offset construction,
removing two unwrap() calls and simplifying the loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
